title: Rich Buttery Mediterranean Eggplant Tagine
description: A cozy Mediterranean dish featuring tender eggplant, rich buttery sauce, and a hint of matcha, perfect for a cold evening. This ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is a delicious and hearty option for any time of the year.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the chicken broth, lemon juice, matcha powder, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced eggplant to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the eggplant slices to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until tender and lightly browned.
Pour the marinade over the eggplant and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and braise for 20 minutes, until the eggplant is very tender and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the crumbled feta cheese and remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Serve the eggplant hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
